calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Norman Macleod for Petitioner.

Mr. Macleod addressed the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes. The Court granted the accounting petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Clauzel.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
